occurrence_sentence: Amazon Web Services, Inc. (AWS), an Amazon.com company, announced the general availability of Amazon Braket, a fully managed AWS service that provides a development environment to help customers explore and design quantum algorithms.

interaction_phrase: announced the general availability of Amazon Braket

interaction_phrase: with the support from the Amazon Quantum Solutions Lab
occurrence_sentence: Working with Amazon Braket and with the support from the Amazon Quantum Solutions Lab, the Rahko-led consortium with Johnson Matthey, King's College London, and the National Physical Laboratory, was awarded an Innovate UK Grant for Quantifi, a project focused on bringing near-term quantum computing capability to material science.
